name: AI-850
description: AI-850 is a Cremophor(R)-free formulation of paclitaxel, the active ingredient in Taxol(R), a product used to treat a variety of solid tumors.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in breast cancer and solid tumors.
mechanismOfAction: AI-850 utilizes Hydrophobic Drug Delivery System or HDDDsTechnology. It is readily dissolving formulation of the hydrophobic drug, paclitaxel, the active ingredient in the cancer drug, Taxol.
